title: ampacus hortensis
intro: Ampacus hortensis, also known as the Common Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and menstrual disorders. The health benefits of Ampacus hortensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant include oil extracted from its seeds, which is often used in topical creams and supplements to support skin and hormonal health.
